sigWerErrors.reason: The word 'có' (have) is omitted, but the overall meaning of 'tôi chưa có quen' (I am not yet familiar) vs 'tôi chưa quen' (I am not familiar) is very similar in Vietnamese and does not significantly change the intent of the sentence.
